title: AMP episodic memory record
description: A stored episodic memory: a specific past event with time and place context.

created_at.description: Unix epoch ms when the record was written

event_time.description: Unix epoch ms when the underlying event actually happened (may differ from created_at).

location.description: Free-form description of where the event occurred (place name, room, URL, coordinates, etc.).

participants.description: Identifiers (user_ids, agent_ids, names) of entities present at the event.
